title: Better Gold Equipment
description: Make Golden Tools & Armor finally useful. Fully configurable.
body:
About

This mod makes golden tools and armor more viable while preserving their fragile nature and low durability.

Features

Tool Tier Configuration: Golden tools can mine blocks up to Iron tier and the sword deals increased damage.

Auto-Repair: Gold-based equipments now slowly regain durability over time.

Everything in the mod is configurable.

Configuration

You can adjust every part of the mod through the configuration file.

Dependencies

This mod has no dependencies.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
